gene_region.label: ALDH2 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical ALDH2 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: ALDH2 encodes the mitochondrial aldehyde dehydrogenase that oxidizes acetaldehyde and other reactive aldehydes, linking ethanol metabolism, mitochondrial stress, and cardiovascular/toxicology research.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local ALDH2 bundle is pharmacogenetic and mitochondrial-detoxification oriented. ALDH2*2 effects are genotype-dose and ancestry dependent and should not be translated into medical advice without clinical context.
variant_effect_overview: ALDH2 rs671 reduces ALDH2 enzymatic activity and can affect acetaldehyde accumulation after alcohol exposure.
Interpretation should consider alcohol exposure, ancestry, heterozygous versus homozygous dosage, and broader aldehyde/toxicology context.
condition_research_overview: Cardiometabolic and cancer-risk exposure interaction research
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: ALDH2 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for ALDH2.
Because ALDH2 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use ALDH2 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000111275: ALDH2 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: ALDH2 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ALDH2 aldehyde-detoxification thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to acetaldehyde metabolism, alcohol flushing biology, mitochondrial oxidative stress, and exposure-linked risk studies. Direction depends strongly on rs671 dosage and exposure context.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs671 (ALDH2 Glu504Lys / ALDH2*2) is curated as a ALDH2 marker for Alcohol flushing and acetaldehyde metabolism, Mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Cardiometabolic and cancer-risk exposure interaction research
research_context: Use this marker as a ALDH2 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs671 (ALDH2 Glu504Lys / ALDH2*2) with ALDH2 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs671 (ALDH2 Glu504Lys / ALDH2*2) or linked ALDH2 locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Alcohol flushing and acetaldehyde metabolism, Mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs671 (ALDH2 Glu504Lys / ALDH2*2) as a gene-specific marker for Alcohol flushing and acetaldehyde metabolism, Mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification and mitochondrial aldehyde detoxification, acetaldehyde metabolism, oxidative-stress handling, and alcohol-response pharmacogenetics.
